verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the likely cause immediately: "access tokens have a short expiry...refresh path isn't actually working"; B starts with a framing question and splits into cases.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder with "Most likely" and a "close second"; B is useful but more of a diagnostic survey: "one of two distinct failure shapes."
verdict.fabrication: B overstates unsupported claims like "This is the #1 cause" and "classic 'random logout in prod'"; A also says "almost always," but is less inflated.
verdict.actionability: B is slightly easier to execute because it says to log exact 401 reasons: "TokenExpiredError vs JsonWebTokenError/invalid signature" and check every instance.
